_README: Committed calibration verdicts for eval_quality_gate.py replay mode (the deterministic, no-LLM CI path). Each value is a bare cast-requirements-render-checker/v1 verdict object, parsed by the PRODUCTION checker_verdict.parse_verdict and gated by the PRODUCTION derive_pass (eval and production share one gate). The two BLOCKING cases — low_quality (MUST fail) and gap_amnesty (MUST NOT fail for a missing outcome) — are the autonomous-mode gate. The deterministic:/maker_evidence: PASS verdicts are the calibrated expectation for a human/scratch --live run (a live FAIL is a human-eyeball carry-forward, never a hard block). Regenerate via: eval_quality_gate.py --live --out-verdicts <file>.

missing: the job is not stated above the fold

issues.description: No Goal Card and no one-sentence job statement above the fold; the WHAT is buried under a generic wall-of-text introduction.
issues.evidence: the zero-click surface opens with 'Introduction and Background Information' boilerplate, not the job

issues.description: Undifferentiated template-dump layout — a single column of dense prose with generic headings; nothing is scannable in the first screen.
issues.evidence: no hierarchy, no pill, no assertions list; the requirement units sit below several screens of preamble

rework_feedback: Lead with a Goal Card: a classification pill, a one-sentence job statement, and 3-5 WHAT assertions, all above the fold.
Cut the boilerplate introduction; surface the US1 cadence, the FR-001 export requirement, and the SC-001 completion window in the first screen.

gap_amnesty.restated_job: Ship a recurring nightly report export so downstream data lands on time within a tight, observable window.
gap_amnesty.restated_outcome: The export runs nightly and completes within ten minutes; one quantified business outcome is explicitly flagged as an unfilled source gap (needs author input), not silently omitted.

issues.description: One business outcome is shown as a .rr-gap marker. This is honest communication of a SOURCE gap (needs author input), not a render defect — recorded as a warning, never an error.
issues.evidence: the 'Known gap' block carries the fixed status vocabulary and a question, not invented content

deterministic:bug_fix.restated_job: Fix the defect described in the goal so the broken behaviour is corrected.
deterministic:bug_fix.restated_outcome: The reported failure no longer reproduces and the fix is verified.

in: the specific defect and its verification

deterministic:new_initiative.restated_job: Stand up the new capability described in the goal.
deterministic:new_initiative.restated_outcome: The capability is delivered and its success criteria are met.

in: the new capability and its acceptance

maker_evidence:bug_fix.restated_job: Resolve the defect so the broken path works as specified.
maker_evidence:bug_fix.restated_outcome: The defect is fixed, verified, and will not regress.

in: the defect, root cause, and verification

issues.description: A dense section could use more whitespace, but the WHAT is clearly stated above the fold.

maker_evidence:new_initiative.restated_job: Deliver the new initiative described in the goal end to end.
maker_evidence:new_initiative.restated_outcome: The initiative ships with its stated acceptance criteria satisfied.

in: the initiative's core capability and acceptance
